headline: 4 Insurance Stocks to Watch for Potential Q1 Earnings Beats
summary: Solid retention, renewals, prudent pricing, exposure growth, and improved digitization are expected to help AXS, PLMR, AIZ, and AJG outperform first-quarter estimates.

raw.headline: 4 Insurance Stocks to Watch for Potential Q1 Earnings Beats

headline: Will Assurant (AIZ) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Assurant (AIZ) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.
